nasb.text: and the Lord uprooted them from their land in anger and in fury and in great wrath, and cast them into another land, as it is this day.’

esv.text: and the Lord  uprooted them from their land in anger and fury and great wrath, and cast them into another land, as they are this day.’

cnv.text: 於是耶和華在烈怒、忿怒和大怒中，把他們從他們的地土拔出來，丟在別的地方，像今天一樣。’

ccb.text: 耶和华盛怒之下把他们从这地方连根拔起，扔到别的地方，正如今日的情形。’
